nativeProps: React select attributes except owned value, defaultValue, and change fields

props.name: visibleRange
props.type: false | YearPickerVisibleRange with at most 5,001 rendered years

compositionPolicy.native: A bounded native select owns keyboard operation, form serialization, validation, and mobile presentation.
compositionPolicy.range: Range count and bounds are associated only when showRangeSummary is true.
compositionPolicy.scale: The default native collection rejects more than 5,001 options; visibleRange enables a consumer-controlled bounded native window for much larger safe-integer domains while retaining the selected form value.
